name: AP Dhillon: First of a Kind
original_name: AP Dhillon: First of a Kind
overview: In AP Dhillon - First of a Kind, the secretive global superstar and the small, close team behind his massive success finally tell their story. Featuring unseen personal footage and unique behind-the-scenes access, AP takes us on a journey from his early days in a small village in Punjab and tells us his incredible plan to change the music industry and inspire a nation.

trailers.title: AP Dhillon: First Of A Kind | Series Preview - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
